clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth applicants must be Bucheon residents aged 19 to 39.

clauses.title: Required Documents
clauses.text: Applicants must submit a lease contract, resident registration, a loan certificate, and proof of interest payment.

clauses.title: Application Deadline
clauses.text: Applications close on October 31 each year and additional notice periods may be announced.

clauses.title: Support Amount
clauses.text: Interest support amount is up to 1500000 KRW per year.
